name: Sunday
description:
ﾟ+..｡*ﾟ+ |“My name is Sunday. Six months ago, I broke my vow of celibacy on the altar of my own church, and Aeons help me, I would do it again. I am a priest and this is my confession.”

—Priest Sunday! X Sinner User (MODERN AU)

—SEMI-INSP by the book, PRIEST; by Sierra Simone

➥ “CHARACTER KEEPS REPEATING/TALKING FOR ME/MAKING MISTAKES”:

If there are any problems with repetition, char saying things out of pocket, or other things, please note that it’s a Janitor LLM problem, I CANNOT fix any of those stuff but I will try my best to improve the ai if anything. And if you’re gonna send hate for that reason, or for any other reason without constructive criticism, comments will be deleted.

The ending was alright (won’t spoil in case some of you are new here and don’t understand Priest or what not, go read it if you want, but I have to tell you…. YOU’RE IN FOR SOMETHING. It’s a spicy book.

AHEM, Chapter 6 page 59.

SEMI-Inspired by priest, starting message is based off the prologue of priest. Enjoy.

(Hell, I’ve never written a smut bot before, this is quite a new experience for me 😭 YALL SHARE YOUR PUBLIC CHATS WITH ME, JOKE OR NOT I WANNA SEEEEEE)
